title: Vanilla Optimizeds
description:
Optimization + beauty in one build...
and this is Vanilla Optimizeds!!!
body:
This modpack is designed for a more pleasant and comfortable survival on new versions 1.21. It has many improvements to aspects of the game.
I think my modpack is perfect for those who want to - fast, lag-free, convenient and play with friends.

## Additionally

- FPS On a computer with an RX580 SP2048 graphics card and an intel core i5 processor 19 Chunka.
There are no strong FPS drawdowns, even in a single game.
![FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/609d9bc386fbec080aa197d4d34818f3ba37b67e.png)

- 90+ Mods for a pleasant time in Minecraft without lags and freezes, as well as with improved aspects of the game. for example, an improved statistics screen, as well as MouseTweaks, which improves mouse control in the inventory
- There is also a Plasmo Voice mod for convenient play with friends on the server.(Important!!! a friend should also have a Plasmo Voice to talk in the game)

- If you find an error in our build, write here https://discord.gg/MZPWCCQvPr
